label: PMI Agile Project Lifecycle
description: 8-phase iterative agile lifecycle (A1–A8) with sprint loops (phases 2–4), backlog-governed change control, and release-based gate enforcement. Covers initiation through closure with governed sprint ceremonies.

phases.name: Initiation
phases.description: Product vision definition and funding approval.

phases.name: Sprint Planning
phases.description: Sprint goal setting, backlog prioritization, and definition of done.

phases.name: Sprint Execution
phases.description: Sprint work, testing, demo evidence, and retrospective.

phases.name: Sprint Review
phases.description: Sprint review, demo evidence, and retrospective summary.

phases.name: Release Gate
phases.description: Increment review, compliance snapshot, and risk delta assessment.

phases.name: Deployment
phases.description: Deployment checklist, production readiness, and rollback strategy.

phases.name: Monitoring
phases.description: Continuous monitoring plan and operational oversight.
